rules.title: Document Title on First Page Matches File Name
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify whether the document title on the first page matches the uploaded file name.
rules.recommendation: Ensure the first page title matches the file name.

rules.title: Author Name and Role Are Mentioned
rules.verifiable_criteria: Check whether both author name and author role are mentioned in the document.
rules.recommendation: Add author name and role information.

rules.title: Dates in Revision History Are Valid
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that all dates in the revision history are valid calendar dates.

rules.title: Version Number Present in Title and Revision History
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that version number is present in both title section and revision history section.

rules.title: Revision Section Is Present
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that a revision history section exists in the document.

rules.title: Signature Blocks Are Present
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that approval or signature blocks exist in the document.

rules.title: Dates Present Near Signatures
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that dates are present near signature blocks.

rules.title: Basic Font and Spacing Consistency
rules.verifiable_criteria: Evaluate whether font usage and spacing appear reasonably consistent throughout the document.

rules.title: Language Errors Identified
rules.verifiable_criteria: Identify grammar, spelling, or language quality issues.

rules.title: Required Sections Present
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that mandatory sections such as Objective, Scope, Responsibilities, Procedure, and References are present.

rules.title: Page Numbers Present and Sequential
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that page numbers are present and sequential throughout the document.

rules.title: Readability Within Acceptable Range
rules.verifiable_criteria: Assess whether the document readability is acceptable for its intended audience.

rules.title: Footer Contains Doc ID, Page Number, Confidentiality
rules.verifiable_criteria: Verify that footer contains document ID, page number, and confidentiality statement.
